company_name: Virtus Artificial Intelligence & Technology Opportunities Fund
description: Virtus Artificial Intelligence & Technology Opportunities Fund is a closed-end multi asset fund spealizes in equity and debt securities. They prefer to invest in artificial intelligence and technology. They use fundamental research. The fund invests at least 80% of its assets in securities tied to artificial intelligence and technology-driven businesses, targeting innovators and disruptors across multiple sectors.
